titleStmt.title: SII 6.2: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 2. (A.R. No. 53 of 1897). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvaŠĻČaccakravat=ti konerimeŠĻČkoŠĻáŠĻ≠ńĀŠĻČ pńĀŠĻáŠĻ≠ikulńĀcaŠĻČivaŠł∑anńĀŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠u UŠĻ≠aiyńĀr tirukkńĀŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠uppaŠł∑Šł∑iUŠĻ≠aiyńĀr koyil tevakaŠĻČmikku
m ŇõrńęmńĀheŇõvarakkaŠĻákńĀŠĻái ceyvńĀrkaŠł∑Šł∑ukkum cikńĀriya√Ī ceyvńĀŠĻČukkum Ikkoyil tirukkńĀmakkoŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠amuŠĻ≠aiya nńĀcciyńĀr AŠłĽakamarmaŠĻÖkaiyńĀrkku veŠĻáŠĻ≠um nivantaŠĻÖ
kaŠł∑ukku IŠĻüuppatńĀka InnńĀŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠u mńĀŠĻüaŠĻČeriyńĀŠĻČa tiŠĻČacintńĀmaŠĻáiccaruppetimaŠĻÖkalattu tirunńĀmattukkńĀŠĻáiyńĀŠĻČa nilam mŇęveli UŠĻ≠paŠĻ≠a oŠĻČpatiŠĻüŠĻüŠĻüuveli nilamum mullaikkuŠĻ≠i
yil tirunńĀmattukkńĀŠĻáiyńĀŠĻČa nilam veliyum patiŠĻČmŇęŠĻČŠĻüńĀvatu mutal tevatńĀŠĻČa IŠĻüaiyiliyńĀka IŠĻ≠akkaŠĻ≠avatńĀkap peŠĻüaveŠĻáumeŠĻČŠĻüu kńĀŠĻÖkeyarńĀyaŠĻČum cetiyarńĀyaŠĻČum
namakkuc coŠĻČŠĻČamaiyil IppaŠĻ≠i ceyyakkaŠĻ≠avatńĀkac collik kaŠĻáakkilum IŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ukkoŠł∑Šł∑akkaŠĻ≠avatńĀka varik=kŇęŠĻüuceyvńĀrkaŠł∑ukku√Ī coŠĻČŠĻČom Innilam patiŠĻČ mŇęŠĻČŠĻüńĀvatumutal tevatńĀ
ŠĻČa IŠĻüaiyiliyńĀka kaikkoŠĻáŠĻ≠u nivanta√Ī celuttac coŠĻČŠĻČom EŠłĽutiŠĻČńĀŠĻČ tirumantira Olai IrńĀjanńĀrńĀyaŠĻáamuventaveŠł∑ńĀŠĻČ Ivai kńĀŠĻÖkeyarńĀyaŠĻČ EŠłĽuttu Ivai laŠĻÖkeŇõvara
ŠĻČ EŠłĽuttu Ivai cetikularńĀyaŠĻČ EŠłĽuttu Ivai vńĀŠĻáńĀdhirńĀyaŠĻČ EŠłĽuttu Ivai viŠłĽuppńĀdhirńĀyaŠĻČ EŠłĽuttu Ivai cimpeŠĻüŠĻüarayaŠĻČ EŠłĽuttu Ivai pirutikaŠĻÖkaŠĻČ EŠłĽuttu Ivai EŠłĽuttu .
Digital edition of SII 6.2 (ARIE/1896-1897/B/1897/53) by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
